span.t-attf-class: vp-badge #{product.vendor_approval_state == 'approved' and 'vp-b-ok' or product.vendor_approval_state == 'rejected' and 'vp-b-err' or 'vp-b-warn'}

t.t-esc: product.vendor_approval_state == 'approved' and 'Live' or product.vendor_approval_state == 'rejected' and 'Rejected' or 'Pending'

t.t-value: order.picking_ids and order.picking_ids.filtered(lambda p: p.picking_type_code == 'outgoing') and order.picking_ids.filtered(lambda p: p.picking_type_code == 'outgoing')[0] or False

span.t-attf-class: vp-badge #{order.state == 'done' and 'vp-b-ok' or order.state == 'cancel' and 'vp-b-err' or 'vp-b-warn'}

t.t-esc: order.state == 'sale' and 'Confirmed' or order.state == 'done' and 'Delivered' or order.state == 'cancel' and 'Cancelled' or order.state

span.t-attf-class: vp-badge #{picking.state == 'done' and 'vp-b-ok' or picking.state == 'assigned' and 'vp-b-info' or 'vp-b-warn'}

t.t-esc: picking.state == 'done' and 'Shipped' or picking.state == 'assigned' and 'Ready' or picking.state == 'confirmed' and 'Waiting' or picking.state

t.t-if: picking and not picking.carrier_id and picking.state not in ('done','cancel')

div.div: Monitor and manage your Fulfillment by Uellow inventory

div.t-attf-style: width:#{min((product.qty_available or 0)/20*100,100)}%;background:#{(product.qty_available or 0) > 5 and '#1A7A6E' or (product.qty_available or 0) > 0 and '#f59e0b' or '#e24b4a'}

span.t-attf-class: vp-badge #{product.fbu_state == 'on_hand' and 'vp-b-ok' or product.fbu_state == 'continue_selling' and 'vp-b-info' or 'vp-b-err'}

t.t-esc: product.fbu_state == 'on_hand' and 'On Hand' or product.fbu_state == 'continue_selling' and 'Continue Selling' or 'Out of Stock'

input.name: account_name
input.placeholder: Full name as on bank account

a.t-attf-style: padding:6px 10px;background:#{(view_mode or 'list')!='grid' and '#1A7A6E' or '#fff'};color:#{(view_mode or 'list')!='grid' and '#fff' or '#666'};text-decoration:none
padding:6px 10px;background:#{(view_mode or 'list')=='grid' and '#1A7A6E' or '#fff'};color:#{(view_mode or 'list')=='grid' and '#fff' or '#666'};text-decoration:none

span.t-attf-class: vp-badge #{product.vendor_approval_state == 'approved' and 'vp-b-ok' or product.vendor_approval_state == 'rejected' and 'vp-b-err' or 'vp-b-warn'}

i.t-attf-class: fa #{product.vendor_approval_state == 'approved' and 'fa-check-circle' or product.vendor_approval_state == 'rejected' and 'fa-times-circle' or 'fa-clock-o'}

t.t-esc: product.vendor_approval_state == 'approved' and 'Approved' or product.vendor_approval_state == 'rejected' and 'Rejected' or 'Pending'

tr.td: No products yet. Add your first product

span.t-attf-class: vp-badge #{product.vendor_approval_state == 'approved' and 'vp-b-ok' or product.vendor_approval_state == 'rejected' and 'vp-b-err' or 'vp-b-warn'}

t.t-esc: product.vendor_approval_state == 'approved' and 'Live' or product.vendor_approval_state == 'rejected' and 'Rejected' or 'Pending'

span.t-attf-class: vp-badge #{sale.state == 'active' and 'vp-b-ok' or sale.state == 'upcoming' and 'vp-b-info' or 'vp-b-gray'}

tr.td: No flash sales yet. Create your first

div.label: Upload Gallery Images
div.div: Select multiple images at once — max 10 images

t.div: No attributes configured. Ask admin to add attributes.

div.div: Product will be reviewed by Uellow admin before going live
